text.title: Buyer-Interview Evidence-Pack Output Contract
text.summary: Defines the shape of the buyer-evidence pack produced after 5+ interviews. The pack is the decision input — keep, refine, or pivot the service offer.

list.item: interviews/buyer-NNN.md per interview: ICP fit notes, raw transcript or 1-page bullet summary, verbatim quotes by question, disqualifier flag.
evidence-pack.md synthesis: hiring trigger themes (with quote count), budget authority distribution, switching-pain map, vendor wishlist top 5 with quotes, recommended action (keep / refine / pivot).
action-log.md: the change made to service-one-pager or offer following the evidence — closes the research loop.
interview_count: integer, >= 5 before synthesis is allowed.
hiring_triggers: clustered list with verbatim citations.
budget_signers: count by role (signer / influencer / no-budget).
switching_pain_top3: each with >= 2 verbatim citations from different interviews.
decision: one of keep / refine / pivot — with 2-3 sentence justification.

antipattern.description: Synthesis written before 5 interviews complete ("emerging themes from 2 conversations").
antipattern.reason: Two-interview synthesis is anecdote; freelancers act on it and lose months on a phantom trend.

antipattern.description: Cluster claim without verbatim citation, OR citations that are paraphrased ("the buyer essentially said...").
antipattern.reason: Paraphrase is the freelancer's own framing leaking back. Verbatim is the falsification anchor.

antipattern.description: Decision = "keep" with zero refinement actions logged after 5 interviews.
antipattern.reason: If 5 buyers said the offer is perfect, either the offer is generic enough to be useless, or the sample is friend-of-freelancer. Both require investigation.

list.item: 5+ interviews logged, each with ICP-fit notes.
Every cluster claim has >= 2 verbatim citations from different interviews.
Budget-authority distribution surfaces at least one named signer per ICP variant.
Vendor wishlist top 5 informs at least one change in action-log.md.
Decision field populated with justification and date.
